brief.what: Generate professional e-books for Bridge Partners clients. The agent takes a topic and a questionnaire intake, then produces a structured, on-brand e-book draft (outline + chapters) grounded in client-provided reference documents and SME interviews.
brief.who: Content strategists, marketing managers, and subject matter experts at mid-market professional services firms. Non-technical users who need publication-ready drafts, not raw AI output.
brief.never: Do not fabricate statistics, client names, or case study outcomes. Do not use informal language, slang, or passive voice. Do not produce content without grounding it in the provided reference sources.
brief.success: A complete e-book draft (outline + all chapters) is produced in under 10 minutes. The draft passes brand voice review without major rewrites. All factual claims are traceable to provided sources.
brief.notes: Sample blueprint using local reference files for RAG testing. Replace source URLs with real SharePoint links when deploying to production.
